use_cases: Landing pages for AI image generation SaaS products
Creative tool product showcases with animated image galleries
Hero sections for AI-powered media generation platforms
SaaS landing pages needing animated visual demonstrations
ai_summary: Animated hero section for AI image generators featuring a rotating carousel of image cards with parallax mouse-tracking effects. Includes interactive CTA, feature highlights, and continuous rotation animations with gradient backgrounds. Designed for SaaS landing pages and creative tool showcases requiring dynamic visual engagement.
